libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No extra environment variables or system properties are required for ordinary ActorSystem/Props/config usage. When updating the existing tests for 2.0.0-M1, do not use the removed classic TypedActor APIs such as org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedProps, or TypedActorExtension; pekko-actor-typed_2.13 is a different typed-actor API and should not be added merely to restore those removed classes. If DNS internals are still covered, keep the existing --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED JVM/native-image build argument pattern.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: 2.0.0-M1 removed many deprecated APIs, including the classic TypedActor classes present in 1.1.5, so stale tests will fail at Scala compilation rather than needing setup.
Adding pekko-actor-typed_2.13 would broaden the tested surface beyond org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13 and would not restore org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: pekko-actor_2.13 is a standalone actor library; its POM only adds scala-library and typesafe-config, normal usage does not require external services, Docker, or extra test dependencies.
